Package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions

package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions
Provides concrete implementations of the standard Registermaschine instructions.

This package contains the operational logic for the machine, categorised into:

  • Arithmetic: Mathematical Operations such as Addition, Subtraction, Division, and Multiplication.
  • Data Movement: Handling register and accumuulator state via MoveInstruction.
  • Control Flow: Altering the Program Counter (PC) via JumpInstruction.
  • I/O: Interacting with the external environment via Input and Output.
  • System: Lifecycle control such as the HaltInstruction.
Registration These instructions are typically mapped to specific opcodes during the XML configuration phase and stored within a ConcreteInstructionSet
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
TiJ
See Also:
  • AbstractInstruction
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.api
    Defines the core interfaces and base classes for the Registermaschine's instruction set.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AdditionInstruction
    Instruction handler that performs integer addition.
    DivisionInstruction
    Instruction handler that performs sequential integer division.
    HaltInstruction
    Instruction that halts program execution immediately.
    InputInstruction
    Instruction that reads an input value from the execution context and stores it in a register.
    JumpInstruction
    Instruction that sets the programme counter to a specified value, effectively performing a jump in program execution.
    MoveInstruction
    Instruction that moves a value into a specified register.
    MultiplicationInstruction
    Instruction handler that performs integer multiplication.
    OutputInstruction
    Instruction handler that outputs a value from the execution context.
    SubtractionInstruction
    Instruction handler that performs integer subtraction.
